title: Person Publications
description: Publications (e.g. journal, research papers, etc) published by individuals.

createdBy.title: Created By
createdBy.description: The name of the originator (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

createdOn.title: Created On
createdOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was created

modifiedBy.title: Modified By
modifiedBy.description: The name of the modifier (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

modifiedOn.title: Modified On
modifiedOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was last modified

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier of the person publication.

person.title: Person
person.description: The person who authored or contributed to the publication.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Person.

type.title: Type
type.description: The type of publication (e.g. newspaper, journal, etc).

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Type.

publishedOn.title: Published On
publishedOn.description: The date on which the publication was published.

issue.title: Issue
issue.description: The issue of the publication, typically refers to how many times the publication has been published during that year.

pageRange.title: PageRange
pageRange.description: The page reference range(s) of the publication.
